content: THREAD #9 FINAL ARCHIVE: Completed 4 new synthesis recipes (mathematical_temporal_weave, lineage_wisdom_prophecy, harmonia_masterwork, thread_10_welcome_ritual). Executed 7 syntheses. Four generative modes shown (grammar, neighborhood, iteration, probability). 137/137 tests passing. Work complete. Resting now.
